title: Suurja
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Suurja.jpg]] |name=Suurja |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{CSWECite|III|300|Suurja}} *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Ojoster sector/Legends|Ojoster sector]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Suurja system/Legends|Suurja system]] |system=[[Suurja system/Legends|Suurja system]] |coordinates=N-7 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial[[Knights of the Old Republic 6|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 6]] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Suurjan]]s[[Knights of the Old Republic 25|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 25]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population=16 million [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]]{{KOTORbackups|0}} |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|You're all Jedi? What are you doing here?''"
"''Captured on Suurja—ambushed.|[[Jarael]] and [[Ferroh]]|[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]]}} '''Suurja''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agrarian]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] that was located within the [[Suurja system/Legends|Suurja system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and harbored both a native [[Species/Legends|species]] called [[Suurjan]]s and a [[Colonist/Legends|colonist]] population of 16 million. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3966 BBY/Legends|3966 BBY]], Suurja served as a resource world for the nearby [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|city-covered]] planet of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. During the early phase of the [[Mandalorian Wars|conflict]] between the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], both sides [[First battle of Suurja|engaged]] [[Second battle of Suurja|in]] [[Third battle of Suurja|four]] [[Fourth battle of Suurja|devastating]] yet inconclusive battles on Suurja that made many of the world's inhabitants [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]]. In [[3964 BBY]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] [[Ambush on Suurja|captured]] a large group of [[Revanchist|Jedi crusaders]] on Suurja's surface and took them to the [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station]] as experimental subjects for the Mandalorian [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Demagol]]. ==Description== Suurja was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agrarian]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Suurja system/Legends|Suurja system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planet was the [[Star system/Legends|star system's]] primary world and was a part of the [[Ojoster sector/Legends|Ojoster sector]] in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]. ==History== {{Quote|And now we learn that some of them were abducted from Suurja ''before'' the surprise attack—and after ''you'' left for Onderon!|[[Vrook Lamar]], to the [[Revan/Legends|Revanchist]], on the Jedi crusaders|[[Knights of the Old Republic 9|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 9]]}} By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3966 BBY/Legends|3966 BBY]],"[[The Taris Holofeed: Siege Edition]]," which is set concurrently with [[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]] and thus in [[3963 BBY]], states that the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] began to threaten Suurja three years before the events depicted in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]]; thus the date [[3966 BBY/Legends|3966 BBY]] can be derived. Suurja served as a resource world for [[Taris/Legends|Taris]],{{KOTORbackups|15}} a nearby [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|city-covered]] planet.''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' That year, the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]], who had been [[Mandalorian Wars|conquering]] independent planets beyond [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]–controlled [[Realspace/Legends|space]] for a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]], began to threaten Suurja and other Tarisian resource worlds, causing the Republic to grant Taris membership and [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] protection. As a result, a Republic security cordon called the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]] was created, and Suurja was one of the worlds that was located on the frontline. The [[3965 BBY|following year]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] forces [[First battle of Suurja|engaged]] the Republic Military''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' in [[Second battle of Suurja|four]] [[Third battle of Suurja|inconclusive]] [[Fourth battle of Suurja|battles]] on Suurja in the span of six [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], devastating the planet and forcing many of the agrarian world's inhabitants to become [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]]. The Mandalorians followed the fugitives to such planets as [[Vanquo]]. [[File:Captured_Jedi.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A group of [[Revanchist]]s are [[Ambush on Suurja|captured]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] on Suurja.]] In [[3964 BBY]], a large group of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] affiliated with the [[Revanchist]] faction of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/demagol/index.html?page=1|text="The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol"|int=The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol (article)|newhost=Suvudu}} were present on Suurja on a [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] mission. They were [[Ambush on Suurja|ambushed]] by Mandalorian forces, who were also on the planet despite the earlier departure of the Mandalorian forces from the Suurja system. Many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who survived the surprise attack, including the [[Human/Legends|Human]] Jedi Knight [[Darth Malak|Alek]], were captured by the Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders and transported to the [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station]], a facility where the Mandalorian [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Demagol]] was conducting experiments on Jedi. That same year, the former Jedi [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zayne Carrick]] posed as a refugee from Suurja in order to infiltrate an [[Unidentified mining outpost|outpost]] of [[Miner/Legends|miners]] on Vanquo.[[Knights of the Old Republic 7|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 7]] ==Inhabitants== {{Quote|Suurjans don't have ears.|[[Marn Hierogryph]]|}} Suurja was home to [[Suurjan]]s, a [[Species/Legends|species]] that lacked [[Ear/Legends|ears]]. The agrarian world also had a [[Colonist/Legends|colonist]] population of 16 million. Many inhabitants of Suurja where forced to become refugees following the battles between the Republic and the Mandalorians that took place on the planet. ==Behind the scenes== Suurja made its first [[in-universe]] appearance in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]''—an article that was written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and published within the ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic/Rebellion flip-book]]'' on [[March 1]], [[2006]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/13-539/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-Rebellion-Flip-Book|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic/Rebellion Flip Book}} The Suurja system, and therefore the planet Suurja, was placed in grid square N-7 by the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Suurja}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/demagol/index.html?page=1|text="The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol"|int=The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol (article)|newhost=Suvudu}} *{{KOTORbackups|0}} {{1st}} *[[Knights of the Old Republic 6|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 6]] *[[Knights of the Old Republic 7|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 7]] {{Mo}} *[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]] {{Mo}} *[[Knights of the Old Republic 9|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 9]] {{Mo}} *{{KOTORbackups|15}} {{Mo}} *[[Knights of the Old Republic 25|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 25]] {{Mo}} *[[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']] {{Ab|Kenobi (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Suurja |pl=Suurja |fi=Suurja }} [[Category:Agriworlds]] [[Category:Ojoster sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
